title: The Unfinished Canvas
subtitle: Chapter 01 · Learning to Notice
introduction: A painter pauses before a sunlit canvas. Do not look for mistakes. Look for what inspired the stroke.
observation: The hand lifts the brush, turns toward the window, and lowers it untouched. A prism catches the late-afternoon light.
reconstruction: Carry the paused brush, the crystal prism, and the color notes from the easel desk.
attunements: The prism splits the light across the linen.
The charcoal underdrawing follows the spectrum.
A note reads: wait for the 5:14 light.
revelation: The canvas was not abandoned; it was waiting for the light.
